3083920.name: House of Secrets
3083920.description:
Welcome to the House of Secrets, where every room holds a mystery, and every shadow has a story.

You wake up inside an old, forgotten mansion. The doors are locked. The windows are boarded. There's no sign of life... yet something is watching. House of Secrets is a first-person mystery adventure that blends exploration, puzzle-solving, and atmospheric storytelling to immerse you in a chilling, slow-burn experience.

Wander through creaking halls and dusty chambers as you uncover notes, objects, and symbols that slowly reveal the mansion’s dark past. Solve intricate puzzles to unlock new areas, unravel hidden narratives, and survive the strange phenomena that occur around you.

This isn’t just about escape it’s about discovery. Why were you brought here? What happened to the people who once lived in this house? And what is the secret no one was meant to find?

Features:

  • 🕯️ Atmospheric first-person exploration in a haunted mansion

  • 🧩 Hand-crafted puzzles that require logic, observation, and memory

  • 📜 A layered story revealed through environmental storytelling and clues

  • 🎵 Subtle, eerie sound design to build tension without cheap jumpscares

  • 🗝️ Non-linear rooms with secrets hidden in plain sight

If you love games like Gone Home, What Remains of Edith Finch, or Amnesia (without the monsters), House of Secrets invites you to slow down, think carefully, and piece together the past — one secret at a time.
3083920.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
